userStories.story: As a student, I want to browse the course catalog so that I can discover new content
criteria: Given I am on the home page
Then I see a list of available courses

userStories.story: As a student, I want to navigate from a course to a specific lesson so that I can study specific content
criteria: Given I am on a course page
When I click on a chapter and then a lesson
Then I am taken to the lesson page

userStories.story: As a student, I want to switch between tabs on a course page so that I can access different learning modes
criteria: Given I am on a course page
When I click on Learn, Practice, or Ask tabs
Then the corresponding tab content is displayed
